text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well, hello there, Trainer. I'm sorry<n>you had to see
that.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Recently, my creative juices have<n>been flowing
best after the sun exits<n>its heavenly stage.
My latest work is an opera written byand starring yours truly. Overlord ofthe Rose Sky will be told intwenty-six parts.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Upon completion, this masterpiece will<n>surely be
seen as a revolutionary<n>contribution changing the
realm of fine<n>arts!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O seems fulfilled with her<n>recent
productivity, but it's also<n>apparent she could use
more rest.
